name: career-forge-lite
description: A local-first career evidence and application-draft workspace.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:unit: node scripts/intent-router-regression.mjs && node scripts/command-center-regression.mjs && node scripts/interview-prep-regression.mjs && node scripts/input-guidance-regression.mjs && node scripts/tailor-handoff-regression.mjs && node scripts/tailored-resume-regression.mjs && node scripts/version-management-regression.mjs && node scripts/resume-export-regression.mjs && node scripts/backup-regression.mjs && node scripts/weekly-review-regression.mjs && node scripts/follow-up-log-regression.mjs && node scripts/dossier-pack-regression.mjs && node scripts/truth-workflow-regression.mjs && node scripts/provenance-completeness-regression.mjs && node scripts/usability-hotfix-regression.mjs && node scripts/migration-coverage-regression.mjs && node scripts/pilot-metrics-regression.mjs && node scripts/durability-regression.mjs && node scripts/entitlement-regression.mjs && node scripts/activation-regression.mjs && node scripts/market-moat-regression.mjs && node scripts/quality-regression-suite.mjs
scripts.acceptance:activation: node scripts/intent-router-regression.mjs && node scripts/activation-regression.mjs && node scripts/cold-user-activation-playtest.mjs && node scripts/activation-browser.mjs
